title: GiveMeGunpowder
description: A mod/plugin that makes some mobs drop more gunpowder
body:
This mod/plugin increases gunpowder drops of creepers, making it easier to obtain gunpowder without creeper farms.

## Drop Rates

| Mob | Gunpowder drops |
|-----|------------|
| Creeper | 3-14 |

*Numbers indicate the range of gunpowder drops per kill*

[GiveMeGunpowder on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/givemegunpowder)
